title: PMMA Spin-coating
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f8jsb","text":"This protocol details how to spin coat a thin layer of PMMA on a glass cover slip.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"8m1oi","text":"Lab coat and gloves must be worn at all times.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"2nvs4","text":"Materials:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"higo","text":"70% ethanol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dlih5","text":"Delicate task wipes (Kimwipes®)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a1bk","text":"100 µL pipette and tips","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"41q93","text":"Tweezers","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1oh1m","text":"Hot plate","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b9kid","text":"Glass cover slip","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2e9dt","text":"Spin Coater","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8nab7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"14o20","text":"Reagents:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ecduj","text":"Poly(methyl methacrylate) [PMMA] solution","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Wipe cover slip with 70% ethanol using a delicate task wipe.
Place cove slip into spin coater, centering with the square in the spin coater.
Dispense 30 µL PMMA solution onto the center of the cover slip.
Spin for 00:00:30 at 2000 rpm. This step can be varied, where higher angular velocities will form thinner coatings.
Carefully remove cover slip from spin coater using tweezers.
Place cover slip onto 180 °C hot plate for 00:01:00 .
creator: Kenneth Schackart
